nodes.context: A street gang alliance originating in Los Angeles, California.
A street gang alliance, rivals of the Crips.
A set of the Crips alliance, formed by Belizean American Crips, active in Los Angeles, New York City, and Belize.

edges.evidence_quote: The Rollin' 30s Harlem Crips are a " set " of the Crips alliance of street gangs.
edges.context: Rollin' 30s Harlem Crips is a subset of the Crips alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: In November 1995 after several members assaulted a teenaged girl who was wearing red clothing — the gang colors of the rival Bloods gang.
edges.context: Rollin' 30s Harlem Crips are rivals of the Bloods, as indicated by the assault on a girl wearing Bloods colors.
